title: pseudoraphis brunoniana
intro: Pseudoraphis brunoniana, also known as Button Grass or Button Bush Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Pseudoraphis brunoniana is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a salve or ointment.
